name: ai-website-validation-platform
description: Enterprise-grade AI website validation platform for Sportstech.

scripts.scan:smoke: QUICK_SCAN=1 MAX_PAGES=1 DEVICE_SET=desktop BROWSERS=chromium REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS=12000 MAX_LINK_CHECKS=3 MAX_CONTROL_CHECKS=5 tsx src/cli/runScan.ts tests/regression
scripts.test:all-suites: playwright test tests/exploration tests/smoke tests/seo tests/security tests/performance tests/accessibility
scripts.test:everything: playwright test tests/exploration tests/smoke tests/seo tests/security tests/performance tests/accessibility tests/visual; code=$?; npm run report:suites; exit $code
scripts.report:suites: tsx src/cli/buildSuiteReport.ts && tsx src/reports/renderPdf.ts || (echo 'report build failed (esbuild/tsx) — retrying once…' && sleep 2 && tsx src/cli/buildSuiteReport.ts && tsx src/reports/renderPdf.ts)
scripts.test:everything:headed: playwright test tests/exploration tests/smoke tests/seo tests/security tests/performance tests/accessibility tests/visual --headed; code=$?; npm run report:suites; exit $code
scripts.test:revenue: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; npm run revenue:prepare && REVENUE_MATRIX=0 playwright test tests/revenue/revenue.spec.ts
scripts.test:revenue:matrix: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; npm run revenue:prepare && REVENUE_MATRIX=1 playwright test tests/revenue/revenue.spec.ts
scripts.test:revenue:headed: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; npm run revenue:prepare && REVENUE_MATRIX=0 BROWSERS=chromium playwright test tests/revenue/revenue.spec.ts --headed
scripts.test:pdp-discovery: BROWSERS=chromium playwright test tests/pdp/pdp-discovery.spec.ts; code=$?; REPORT_HTML=reports/pdp-discovery.html OUTPUT_PDF=reports/pdp-discovery.pdf PDF_TITLE='PDP Discovery Report' PDF_PRESERVE_THEME=1 tsx src/reports/renderPdf.ts; exit $code
scripts.test:pdp-discovery:headed: BROWSERS=chromium playwright test tests/pdp/pdp-discovery.spec.ts --headed; code=$?; REPORT_HTML=reports/pdp-discovery.html OUTPUT_PDF=reports/pdp-discovery.pdf PDF_TITLE='PDP Discovery Report' PDF_PRESERVE_THEME=1 tsx src/reports/renderPdf.ts; exit $code
scripts.test:pdp-cart: PDP_CART=1 playwright test tests/pdp-cart; code=$?; npm run report:pdp-cart; exit $code
scripts.test:pdp-cart:fast: PDP_CART=1 FAST_MODE=true playwright test tests/pdp-cart --workers=3; code=$?; npm run report:pdp-cart; exit $code
scripts.test:pdp-cart:headed: PDP_CART=1 FAST_MODE=true playwright test tests/pdp-cart --headed --workers=1; code=$?; npm run report:pdp-cart; exit $code
scripts.test:pdp-cart-payment: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; BROWSERS=chromium playwright test tests/pdp/pdp-cart-payment.spec.ts; code=$?; tsx src/cli/runPdpCartReport.ts; exit $code
scripts.test:pdp-cart-payment:headed: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; HEADED=1 BROWSERS=chromium PDP_CART_CONCURRENCY=1 playwright test tests/pdp/pdp-cart-payment.spec.ts; code=$?; tsx src/cli/runPdpCartReport.ts; exit $code
scripts.revenue:report: tsx src/cli/runRevenueReport.ts || (echo 'revenue report failed (esbuild/tsx) — retrying once…' && sleep 2 && tsx src/cli/runRevenueReport.ts)
scripts.revenue: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; npm run revenue:prepare && REVENUE_MATRIX=0 playwright test tests/revenue/revenue.spec.ts; code=$?; npm run revenue:report; exit $code
scripts.revenue:matrix: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; npm run revenue:prepare && REVENUE_MATRIX=1 playwright test tests/revenue/revenue.spec.ts; code=$?; npm run revenue:report; exit $code
scripts.revenue:full: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; npm run revenue:prepare && REVENUE_MATRIX=1 playwright test tests/revenue/revenue.spec.ts; code=$?; REVENUE_MATRIX=0 BROWSERS=chromium playwright test tests/revenue/media.spec.ts || code=$?; npm run revenue:report; exit $code
scripts.investigate:full: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; npm run revenue:prepare && REVENUE_MATRIX=1 playwright test tests/revenue/revenue.spec.ts; code=$?; REVENUE_MATRIX=0 BROWSERS=chromium playwright test tests/revenue/media.spec.ts || code=$?; tsx src/cli/runRevenueReport.ts; tsx src/cli/runInvestigation.ts; exit $code
scripts.pdf:revenue: REPORT_HTML=reports/revenue-dashboard.html OUTPUT_PDF=reports/revenue-report.pdf PDF_TITLE='Revenue Protection Report' PDF_PRESERVE_THEME=1 tsx src/reports/renderPdf.ts
scripts.validate:all: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; npm run test:everything; npm run revenue:full; npm run report:share:zip
scripts.validate:all:headed: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; npm run test:everything:headed; npm run revenue:full; npm run report:share:zip
scripts.validate:chromium: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; export BROWSERS=chromium; npm run test:everything; npm run test:revenue; npm run media; npm run revenue:report; npm run report:share:zip
scripts.validate:chromium:headed: export REVENUE_RUN_ID=${REVENUE_RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)-$$}; export BROWSERS=chromium; npm run test:everything:headed; npm run test:revenue:headed; npm run test:media:headed; npm run revenue:report; npm run report:share:zip
scripts.report:teams: npm run report:share && cd reports && rm -f teams-report.zip && zip -q teams-report.zip executive-summary.pdf revenue-report.pdf investigation-report.pdf dashboard-shareable.html revenue-dashboard.html 2>/dev/null; echo "\n✅ Teams bundle (attach this): $(pwd)/teams-report.zip"
